---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
engine: knitr
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# Required to enable inline R expressions below
1 + 1
```

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-label">Data Science &amp; AI Portfolio</div>
    <h1>Javier<br>Bravo Bernal</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">
      Mechatronics Engineer &amp; M.S. Applied AI candidate at Baruch College.<br>
      Bridging industrial automation and data-driven intelligence.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Projects</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598/" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost">LinkedIn ↗</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-num">4+</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Years of Industry Experience</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-num">3</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Countries · Ecuador &amp; USA</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-num">M.S.</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Applied AI · Baruch College</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     ABOUT SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="about" class="section">
  <div class="section-tag">// 01</div>
  <div class="section-title">About Me</div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p>
        I'm a <strong>Mechatronics Engineer</strong> with a strong background in
        automation, control systems, and electrical engineering. My career started
        in Ecuador, where I worked as an <strong>Electrical Engineer</strong> in
        a ceramic plant — programming PLCs, maintaining industrial motors, and
        keeping production lines running. I then moved into
        <strong>Quality Control</strong>, evaluating X-ray medical equipment
        against national regulations for Inglemed.
      </p>
      <p>
        Today, based in <strong>New York City</strong>, I work as a
        <strong>Service Engineer at Ecolab</strong>, designing digital maintenance
        systems and troubleshooting complex electromechanical equipment for
        enterprise clients. In parallel, I'm completing my
        <strong>M.S. in Applied Artificial Intelligence at Baruch College</strong>,
        combining my engineering foundation with machine learning, deep learning,
        and data analytics.
      </p>
      <p>
        My goal is to bridge the gap between physical systems and intelligent
        software — building solutions that are both technically robust and
        data-informed.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="highlight-box">
      <h4>Education</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>M.S. Applied Artificial Intelligence<br><em style="opacity:.7">Baruch College · 2025–Present</em></li>
        <li>B.S. Mechatronics Engineering<br><em style="opacity:.7">Tecnológico de Monterrey · 2017–2021</em></li>
        <li>Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)<br><em style="opacity:.7">Microsoft Certification</em></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SKILLS SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="skills" class="section" style="background:#fff; max-width:100%; padding: 4rem;">
<div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">
  <div class="section-tag">// 02</div>
  <div class="section-title">Skills &amp; Tools</div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h4>Programming</h4>
      <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">MATLAB</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">C</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h4>AI &amp; Machine Learning</h4>
      <span class="skill-tag">Machine Learning</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Deep Learning</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">scikit-learn</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">TensorFlow</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Neural Networks</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h4>Data &amp; Analytics</h4>
      <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">tidyverse</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Pandas</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">ggplot2</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h4>Cloud &amp; Platforms</h4>
      <span class="skill-tag">Microsoft Azure</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Azure Data (DP-900)</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">GitHub</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Quarto</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h4>Automation &amp; Controls</h4>
      <span class="skill-tag">Rockwell / Allen Bradley PLC</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">TIA Portal</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">SCADA / HMI</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">IEC 61131-3</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">LabVIEW</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <h4>Design &amp; Simulation</h4>
      <span class="skill-tag">SolidWorks</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">AutoCAD</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Raspberry Pi</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Sensor Integration</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     PROJECTS SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="projects" class="section">
  <div class="section-tag">// 03</div>
  <div class="section-title">Projects</div>
  <p style="color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:2rem; font-size:.95rem;">
    Each project below includes a full write-up with annotated code and analysis.
    More coming as the M.S. program progresses.
  </p>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <!-- PROJECT 1 – NUMISMATICA MEXICO -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-num">PROJECT · 01</div>
      <h3>Numismática México — Holiday Sales Strategy</h3>
      <p>
        Tableau data story for a Mexican numismatics retailer. Identified the
        star product (~25% of Q4 profit), quantified ad lift (64%), and produced
        a focused regional marketing playbook.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Tableau</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Data Visualization</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Marketing Analytics</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Storytelling</span>
      </div>
      <a href="projects/numismatica-mexico.html" class="project-link">View Project →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- PROJECT 2 – CREDIT RISK CLASSIFICATION -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-num">PROJECT · 02</div>
      <h3>Credit Risk Classification</h3>
      <p>
        End-to-end scikit-learn pipeline benchmarking Logistic Regression,
        Random Forest, and SVM on the German Credit dataset with repeated
        stratified CV. ROC-AUC 0.78, with a discussion of the recall trade-off.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="project-tag">scikit-learn</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Classification</span>
      </div>
      <a href="projects/credit-risk.html" class="project-link">View Project →</a>
    </div>

    <!-- PROJECT 3 – PLACEHOLDER -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-num">PROJECT · 03</div>
      <h3>US Internal Migration &amp; Congressional Reapportionment</h3>
      <p>
        Explores ACS migration flow data to forecast state populations by 2030
        and model congressional seat reapportionment using Huntington-Hill method.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">R</span>
        <span class="project-tag">tidycensus</span>
        <span class="project-tag">ACS Data</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Forecasting</span>
      </div>
      <span class="badge-coming">⏳ Write-up Coming Soon</span>
    </div>

    <!-- PROJECT 4 – PLACEHOLDER -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-num">PROJECT · 04</div>
      <h3>Project Title Coming Soon</h3>
      <p>
        Full analysis write-up with annotated R/Python code, data visualizations,
        and findings. Drop your <code>.qmd</code> file into the repo and link it here.
      </p>
      <div class="project-tags">
        <span class="project-tag">Deep Learning</span>
        <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="project-tag">TensorFlow</span>
      </div>
      <span class="badge-coming">⏳ Coming Soon</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     EXPERIENCE SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="experience" class="section" style="background:#fff; max-width:100%; padding: 4rem;">
<div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">
  <div class="section-tag">// 04</div>
  <div class="section-title">Experience</div>
  <div class="timeline">

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-meta">2024 – PRESENT</div>
      <h4>Service Engineer</h4>
      <div class="tl-company">Ecolab · New York, NY</div>
      <ul>
        <li>Designed a digital maintenance tracking system reducing downtime by 15%.</li>
        <li>Led troubleshooting and installation of complex electromechanical systems.</li>
        <li>Improved team productivity by 20% through mentoring and structured diagnostics.</li>
        <li>Collaborated with sales and operations to align technical solutions with client needs.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-meta">2022 – 2024</div>
      <h4>Quality Control Engineer</h4>
      <div class="tl-company">Inglemed · Ecuador</div>
      <ul>
        <li>Diagnosed electromechanical faults in X-ray equipment; reduced error rates by 12%.</li>
        <li>Analyzed performance data to validate technical solutions against national regulations.</li>
        <li>Updated technical documentation and system schematics.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="tl-meta">2021 – 2022</div>
      <h4>Business Operations &amp; Data Analyst</h4>
      <div class="tl-company">Family Healthcare Business · Ecuador</div>
      <ul>
        <li>Built dashboards in Python, SQL, and Tableau to optimize inventory and customer retention.</li>
        <li>Increased profitability by 8% through cost optimization modeling and supplier analysis.</li>
        <li>Improved monthly revenue by 10% via demand forecasting and behavioral analytics.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTACT SECTION
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="contact" class="section">
  <div class="section-tag">// 05</div>
  <div class="section-title">Get In Touch</div>
  <div class="contact-bar">
    <div>
      <h3>Let's connect.</h3>
      <p>Open to opportunities in AI, Data Analytics, and engineering-driven tech roles.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-links">
      <a href="mailto:jsvierbravo25@hotmail.com" class="contact-link">
        <span class="contact-icon">EMAIL</span>
        jsvierbravo25@hotmail.com
      </a>
      <a href="tel:+13476777946" class="contact-link">
        <span class="contact-icon">PHONE</span>
        347-677-7946
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598/" target="_blank" class="contact-link">
        <span class="contact-icon">IN</span>
        linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jalfred259806" target="_blank" class="contact-link">
        <span class="contact-icon">GH</span>
        github.com/jalfred259806
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     FOOTER
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="site-footer">
  Last Updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%B %d, %Y")` &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  Javier Bravo Bernal &nbsp;·&nbsp; Built with Quarto &amp; R
</div>
